summary: Classified five open pull requests from live inventory as standalone work. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are planned.

actions.reason: Standalone provider/channel bug-fix PR with missing behavior proof. It is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive based on hydrated evidence.
Standalone Comfy runtime compatibility fix that still needs real behavior proof. It is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive based on hydrated evidence.
Maintainer-associated broad UI feature PR should remain open as independent work. It is not suitable for closeout or merge planning in this inventory shard.
Standalone media-understanding resilience fix with missing real behavior proof. Security-shaped check names in CI are passing checks, not a report of a vulnerability in this PR.
Standalone provider performance/runtime PR with supplied proof, but this shard is not authorized to merge or repair and should keep the PR open for maintainer/author flow.
